title: sphaeranthus stuhlmannii
intro: Sphaeranthus stuhlmannii, also known as the African globe daisy or Stuhlmann's sphaeranthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in African folk medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus stuhlmannii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are said to promote healing and relaxation.
